author: Neurocloud
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Simple, efficient, and lightweight self-hosted live sync with end-to-end encrypted vault synchronization

manifest.author: NeuroCloud
manifest.description: A lightweight self-hosted live synchronization tool, to keep all your data synced, encrypted, and under your control.
manifest.name: Light-LiveSync

name: Light-LiveSync

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description:
Light-LiveSync 0.1.12 adds batched remote apply behavior, an Activity-tab backup recovery tool, and README cleanup for automatic first sync and fast pull/apply behavior.

Highlights:
- Pulled remote files now apply in batches by default instead of one file at a time.
- Advanced settings now expose the maximum remote files applied per sync.
- Settings now include a recovery area for restoring files from automatic recovery backups.
- README wording now reflects automatic first full-vault sync and removes obsolete build/mobile sections.

Verified locally with typecheck, production build, 23 harnesses, package creation, release verification, privacy sweep, and testing-vault install audit.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.12

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description: Light-LiveSync 0.1.11 fixes the manifest description punctuation warning and makes first full-vault sync automatic for setup/startup/periodic sync when the remote has no current vault documents. The sync engine now asks the plugin to scan and queue the current vault after remote inspection confirms an empty vault, then pushes without requiring manual Sync now. Harness evidence includes automaticFirstSyncQueued=true and automaticFirstSyncPulledOwnUpload=false.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.11

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description: Light-LiveSync 0.1.10 adds verified full-vault sync behavior. Manual Sync now recursively scans vault config, hidden files, and other plugin data through the vault adapter while keeping Light-LiveSync's own volatile runtime data and generated preview/staging/conflict folders local-only. Large text files now use larger chunks and CouchDB writes are safely batched to avoid oversized bulk requests. First full-vault uploads to an empty remote skip pulling back the same device's own uploads. Verified against the testing vault using saved plugin credentials: 380 files queued and pushed, 0 failed uploads, 0 conflicts, 0 pending push, 0 pending apply, with the remote ending at 3,083 documents after optimized chunking.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.10

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description: Light-LiveSync 0.1.9 improves first-time and manual sync behavior by scanning the current vault before uploading, so existing vault files are queued for fingerprint-checked sync. It also fixes the compact status label so completed push/pull runs show as Synced, marks interrupted previous runs on startup, and polishes settings layout with a constrained add-device URI modal, selectable settings text, full-width advanced controls, and an auto-scrolling activity console.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.9

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description: Light-LiveSync 0.1.8 fixes setup URI import when the URI is pasted from full CouchDB helper terminal output, including surrounding quotes or prompt text. It also clarifies the Use setup URI screen text so users can paste the helper output without having to trim it perfectly.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.8

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description: Light-LiveSync 0.1.7 revises setup wording around Server Domain, Database Name, Database User, and Database Password from the server-side CouchDB instance; clarifies how those values map into the generated setup URI; and improves spacing plus full-width field layout in the Prepare command modal.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.7

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description: Light-LiveSync 0.1.6 removes the misleading Connect action from the CouchDB command-prep modal, adds optional CouchDB admin credentials to the copied setup command, updates the hosted setup helper so it can create/update the sync user and database with admin credentials, improves HTTP 401 guidance, verifies the sync user after setup, and renames the settings action to Prepare command.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.6

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description: Light-LiveSync 0.1.5 keeps the Connect CouchDB password field blank when reopened, adds a readable Recent activity log to the Sync activity tab, reorganizes setup into numbered steps with clearer server-side CouchDB command guidance, narrows setup/settings layouts, and shortens the bottom status bar to concise labels.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.5

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description: Light-LiveSync 0.1.4 adds a hosted CouchDB setup helper, a copyable setup recovery command, automatic same-device credential restore without a recurring manual unlock step, top settings tabs, an Activity tab connection summary, and removes the builtin-modules package warning.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.4

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description:
Light-LiveSync 0.1.3 updates plugin metadata.

Changes:
- Sets the plugin description to: A lightweight self-hosted live synchronization tool, to keep all your data synced, encrypted, and under your control
- Sets the plugin author to NeuroCloud.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.3

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description:
Light-LiveSync 0.1.2 improves CouchDB setup handling.

Changes:
- Direct setup now retries through the app request transport when the first transport may be blocked.
- HTTP 401 now gives clear username/password guidance instead of a vague HTTP failure.
- HTTP 403 now points to database permission issues.
- Release verification remains pinned to the corrected 0.1.2 manifest.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.2

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description:
Light-LiveSync 0.1.1 focuses on smoother mobile and first-sync behavior.

Changes:
- Saved sync credentials now restore automatically on app start for the same device.
- CouchDB addresses are normalized more carefully, including plain IP/host entries and HTTPS domains.
- Default upload batch size is raised for full-vault first syncs while unchanged-file fingerprints still prevent redundant uploads.
- Vault configuration and plugin data files can now sync.
- Runtime checks run automatically in the background instead of needing manual settings buttons.
- Settings are split into Sync, Sync activity, and Advanced pages, with the old safety explanation removed.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.1

releases.author: NeuroCloud-Activate
releases.description:
Initial Light-LiveSync release.

Highlights:
- Simple CouchDB live sync for Obsidian with setup URI compatibility.
- E2EE-required sync defaults and encrypted local credential storage.
- 60-second edit batching, small sync batches, and offline-aware retry behavior.
- Automatic text merge with recovery backups.
- Calm status presentation plus runtime checks and non-secret evidence reporting.
releases.name: Light-LiveSync 0.1.0
